overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city. The camera moves from a neon-lit covered walkway through a busy intersection with futuristic traffic and towering digital billboards. The scene features vibrant neon reflections on wet streets and a dense urban atmosphere reminiscent of Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with blue neon ceiling

events.description: pedestrian with glowing umbrella passes directly in front of the camera from right to left
futuristic vehicle drives past on the wet street to the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath blue neon ceiling lights

notable_agents.action: person holding a glowing purple umbrella walking past the camera

entered.detail: overhead covering with blue neon strip lights running along the ceiling
wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes on the wet pavement
green neon sign with Japanese characters indicating business is open
tall buildings covered in colorful neon advertisements and vertical lighting strips

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk street at night, moving along a covered walkway illuminated by blue neon ceiling lights. A pedestrian with a glowing umbrella passes by, while futuristic cars drive past on the wet street below. The yellow-striped crosswalk and Japanese neon signage establish the dense urban atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway transitioning to open intersection

events.description: exiting the deep covered section into a more open area approaching the intersection
Grant Ave street sign becomes visible ahead, indicating approach to major intersection

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk approaching the Grant Ave intersection, passing parked vehicles

entered.detail: red street sign indicating Grant Ave intersection ahead
tall pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights
bench with pedestrians sitting along the building facade

segments.scene_description: Moving along the covered walkway as it opens up toward a major intersection. The Grant Ave sign becomes visible in the distance, and parked futuristic cars line the street. The blue neon ceiling continues overhead but the space becomes more open, revealing more of the towering neon-lit buildings ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection crosswalk with heavy neon signage

events.description: stepping off the curb to begin crossing the wide intersection
futuristic black car drives through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection at Grant Ave, navigating around other pedestrians on the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking ahead on the crosswalk toward the far side
futuristic black sports car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: wide open street crossing with highly reflective wet surface showing neon reflections
massive glowing advertisements on building facades showing various cyberpunk imagery
skyscrapers with illuminated windows rising in the background

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a vast intersection as the camera steps off the curb to cross. Large digital billboards illuminate the left side with vibrant advertisements, while futuristic cars navigate the wet streets. Pedestrians in cyberpunk attire cross in the same direction, and the Grant Ave sign recedes behind as the camera moves into the open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: expansive downtown intersection with towering neon advertisements

events.description: futuristic vehicle with glowing undercarriage passes by on the right
approaching the far side of the intersection with NCART station signage visible

agents.ego_description: continuing across the expansive wet intersection surrounded by towering neon billboards and futuristic traffic

notable_agents.action: person in bright turquoise jacket standing near the curb on the far side

entered.detail: green neon signage indicating the NCART station entrance on the approaching corner
towering digital screens displaying animated advertisements high on building faces
free-standing display showing rotating holographic product advertisements

segments.scene_description: The final segment traverses the wide open intersection surrounded by massive vertical billboards and neon-drenched architecture. Futuristic vehicles pass by on the wet reflective asphalt as the camera approaches the far side where NCART station signage becomes visible. The scene maintains the dense cyberpunk atmosphere with towering advertisements illuminating the rainy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered neon walkway into the expansive, rain-drenched heart of a cyberpunk intersection. It begins beneath a covered path illuminated by blue neon ceiling lights, gliding past a pedestrian with a glowing umbrella and futuristic cars on the wet street below. As the walkway opens up, the camera moves toward a distant Grant Ave sign, revealing the towering scale of the surrounding neon-lit architecture. The scene then expands as the camera steps off the curb and into a vast intersection, where vibrant digital billboards cast colorful light over pedestrians in cyberpunk attire. Finally, the movement traverses the wide, reflective asphalt of the open plaza, passing beneath massive vertical advertisements before approaching the NCART station signage on the far side.
